name: isolet_seed42_prototype_v1
purpose: Exercise HoRU on the public ISOLET distribution using the repository's reproducible Dirichlet federation with a user-specified seed.

data.split: pooled official ISOLET files then deterministic per-client 70/30 split
data.provenance: REPO_EXISTING federation behavior; explicitly not the manuscript's unarchived original federated split.

parameter_provenance.isolet_federation: REPO_EXISTING; UNSPECIFIED_BY_PAPER for the original split

limitations: The manuscript's original ISOLET federated split is unavailable; this uses the repository's deterministic Dirichlet partition.
The original paper-run data snapshot, complete seed protocol, and aggregation rule are unavailable.
This manifest must never be described as a paper reproduction or used to regenerate the paper table.
